title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: This video argues that programming language selection significantly impacts AI team productivity, particularly as team size grows. It advocates for TypeScript over Python due to superior type checking, LSP support, and compile-time error detection, while emphasizing modular code architecture for effective AI-assisted development.
